about.title: Over 20 Years of Experience
about.description: Our law firm provides the highest quality legal advice and advocacy services to our clients. With our commitment to ethical values and client satisfaction-oriented approach, we are your reliable solution partner in your legal processes.

teamPage.description: Our law firm's strong and experienced team of lawyers consists of professionals specialized in their respective fields. We continuously improve ourselves to provide the best service to our clients.

valuesPage.title: Our Values
valuesPage.subtitle: Our principles and work philosophy
valuesPage.description: Our law firm is committed to providing the highest standard of service to our clients. Our values guide us in every case and every client relationship.

integrity.title: Honesty
integrity.description: Transparency and honesty are our most important values in legal processes. We always maintain open and clear communication with our clients and provide information at every stage of the process. A relationship of trust is the foundation of a successful attorney-client relationship.

expertise.title: Expertise
expertise.description: Law is a constantly evolving field, and our team closely follows current legislation and case law. We improve ourselves through regular training and seminars to provide our clients with the most accurate and up-to-date legal information.

dedication.title: Dedication
dedication.description: We embrace every case as our own and work with all our strength to protect our clients' rights in the most effective way. With our result-oriented approach and meticulous work ethic, we aim to achieve the best outcome.

team.title: Our Team
team.subtitle: Our experienced and specialized team of lawyers

metadata.title: Law Office | Professional Legal Advice
metadata.description: We offer professional legal consultancy services in criminal law, family law, labor law and many other areas with our expert team of lawyers.

hero.title: Your Trusted Legal Solution Partner
hero.subtitle: With our experienced team of lawyers, we are at your side in your legal processes. We work to protect your rights in the most effective way.

services.title: Our Areas of Expertise
services.subtitle: We offer professional support on a wide range of legal matters

criminal.title: Criminal Law
criminal.description: Expert support on defense, investigation processes and detention in criminal cases.
criminal.longDescription: Our expert lawyers in criminal law work to protect our clients' rights in the most effective way. We are by your side at every step, from the investigation phase to the trial process. Our experienced team aims to achieve the best result by creating a strong defense strategy in criminal cases.

family.title: Family Law
family.description: Legal counseling in divorce, custody, alimony and property division cases.
family.longDescription: We stand by our clients with a sensitive and professional approach in family law. We ensure that you reach the fairest solution by protecting your rights in matters such as divorce, custody, alimony and property division. Our experienced team works with you through mediation and litigation processes.

labor.title: Labor Law
labor.description: Employer-employee disputes, work accidents and compensation cases.
labor.longDescription: We provide comprehensive legal services to protect the rights of both employees and employers in labor law. From employment contracts to compensation cases, from work accidents to union rights, we are by your side with our experienced team across a wide range of issues.

commercial.title: Commercial Law
commercial.description: Company establishment, commercial contracts and commercial dispute resolution.
commercial.longDescription: We provide all legal services that companies need in commercial law. We are by your side with our expert team in company establishment, mergers and acquisitions, preparation of commercial contracts, and resolution of commercial disputes.

administrative.title: Administrative Law
administrative.description: Annulment actions and full judgment actions against administrative acts and actions.
administrative.longDescription: We work to protect the rights of individuals and institutions against public administration in administrative law. We provide services with our expert team in annulment of administrative actions, full judgment lawsuits, and disputes arising from administrative contracts.

realEstate.title: Real Estate Law
realEstate.description: Support in land registry transactions, lease disputes and zoning law.
realEstate.longDescription: We provide legal consultancy in a wide range of real estate law, from property purchase and sale to lease disputes, from zoning law to condominium ownership. We are by your side to protect your property rights and secure your real estate transactions.

about.description: With over 20 years of experience, we provide our clients with the highest quality legal advice and advocacy services. With our commitment to ethical values and client satisfaction-oriented approach, we are your reliable solution partner in your legal processes.
about.teamSubtitle: Our experienced and coordinated team manages the most complex legal processes with a solution-oriented approach for our clients.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: As one of Turkey's leading independent law firms, to provide legal services at international standards and to continue being our clients' trusted solution partner.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To protect our clients' rights in the most effective way at every stage of legal processes, and to produce sustainable solutions while adhering to transparent and ethical values.

integrity.title: Honesty and Transparency
integrity.description: We always take a transparent and honest approach to earn our clients' trust.

expertise.title: Specialization
expertise.description: We continuously improve ourselves and provide services with the most up-to-date legal information.

dedication.title: Client Focus
dedication.description: We embrace every case as our own and work with a results-oriented approach.

practiceAreas.title: Our Services
practiceAreas.subtitle: Aşcı Etci Benglian Law Partnership stands by its clients at every stage of the legal process.
practiceAreas.intro1: Aşcı Etci Benglian Law Partnership delivers independent and multidisciplinary legal services to a broad client base — from individuals to conglomerates, domestic entrepreneurs to multinational corporations.
practiceAreas.intro2: Our deep expertise spans corporate and commercial law, mergers and acquisitions, competition, real estate, capital markets, banking and finance, energy and infrastructure, project finance, tax disputes, employment law, and commercial and administrative arbitration — enabling us to provide strategic, results-driven counsel across every area.
practiceAreas.intro3: We assess each matter on its own merits, proactively identify risks to secure our clients' legal interests, and when called upon, represent them with resolve and precision.
practiceAreas.contactCta: If you are looking for a trusted partner in your legal matters, we are ready to meet.

stats.title: Us in Figures
stats.subtitle: Years of experience and thousands of successful cases

items.question: Is the initial legal consultation free of charge?
items.answer: Yes, our first consultation is completely free. During this meeting, we comprehensively evaluate your legal situation, inform you about potential processes and strategies, and determine the most suitable course of action together. The consultation takes approximately 30-45 minutes and can be conducted in person or online.

items.question: How long does a typical court case take?
items.answer: Case durations vary depending on the type of case, the court's workload, and the complexity of the file. For instance, uncontested divorce cases may be resolved within a few weeks, while commercial disputes or serious criminal cases may take several years. We share the estimated timeline of your case in detail during the initial consultation.

items.question: How are attorney fees determined?
items.answer: Our fees are determined based on the Istanbul Bar Association's minimum fee tariff, taking into account the nature, scope, and estimated duration of the case. We provide a transparent fee proposal during the initial consultation and inform you about payment plan options. We do not apply surprise costs or hidden fees.

items.question: In which areas of law do you provide services?
items.answer: We offer comprehensive legal services in corporate and commercial law, mergers and acquisitions, competition law, real estate, capital markets, banking and finance, energy and infrastructure, project finance, tax disputes, labor law, criminal law, family law, and commercial and administrative arbitration.

items.question: Do you offer online legal consultation services?
items.answer: Yes, we provide online legal consultation services to our domestic and international clients through secure video conferencing platforms. Regardless of your geographic location, it is possible to receive the same quality of service as an in-person meeting. Please contact us to schedule an online consultation.

items.question: How do you keep me informed during the case process?
items.answer: We proactively inform our clients at every stage of the process. We provide regular updates on hearing dates, petition processes, and court decisions. Additionally, we offer a direct communication channel through a dedicated attorney assigned to each client, ensuring quick responses to your questions.

items.question: Do you provide corporate legal advisory services for companies?
items.answer: Yes, we offer corporate advisory services to a wide range of businesses, from SMEs to holding companies. We proactively manage your company's legal needs in areas such as company formation, contract preparation and negotiation, compliance processes, labor law advisory, and commercial dispute management.

items.question: What should I do in urgent legal situations?
items.answer: In cases of detention, arrest, or situations requiring urgent legal intervention, you can reach us by phone. We also provide support for emergency situations outside of business hours. Our experienced criminal law team takes immediate action to protect your rights as quickly as possible.

bentoGrid.headline: Why Choose Us?
bentoGrid.subtext: With years of experience, an expert team, and a client-focused approach, we are by your side in every field.
